case_title: MICHAEL WADE VS. LUCAS CUONG NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED MAR-05-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LUCAS CUONG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO AUG-16-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. PROGRESS REPORT IS CONTINUED: APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES INFORMED OF THE CONTINUANCE. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-21-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WADE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCAS CUONG NGUYEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT CSR # 300210. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 3 PAYMENTS. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE ON MAY-15-2023 AND JUN-15-2023 FOR $333.33 AND A FINAL PAYMENT OF $333.34 DUE ON JUL-15-2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUL-21-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA (#300215) PREVIOUS REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY WADE, MICHAEL NGUYEN, LUCAS CUONG
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
